title: Beyond Survival
description: An enhanced survival modpack with improved performance and expanded features.
body:
# Beyond Survival

Dive into Minecraft as you know it — only smoother, cleaner, and more immersive.  
**Beyond Survival** is a Vanilla-style modpack that enhances the classic experience through subtle visual upgrades, performance optimizations, and quality-of-life improvements while maintaining the authentic Minecraft feel.

---

## About the Modpack
Beyond Survival refines the Vanilla gameplay experience by improving visuals and stability without changing the core mechanics.  
It includes a selection of compatible **shaders** for enhanced lighting and atmosphere, as well as **Xaero’s Minimap** for better navigation — all carefully balanced to preserve the original aesthetic.

---

## Development Status
**Current version:** Finished for 1.21.8

---

## Multiplayer
With **e4mc**, players can easily create and join servers through LAN from anywhere, making multiplayer setup straightforward and accessible.

---

## Author
Created and maintained by **QuestXen**, the original owner and developer of Beyond Survival.  
Feedback and suggestions are appreciated as the project moves toward its 2.0 release.

---

## Stay Updated
Follow the project to receive updates on the upcoming full release, featuring enhanced design, improved performance, and a complete menu rework.
